rows.label: qev050904_MSG0002
rows.name: Now then, I would like us to begin our mock battle immediately.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050904_MSG0003
rows.name:
Naturally, there is no need to hold back.
I intend to fight as if this were a real battle.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050904_MSG0004
rows.name: I ask that you do the same.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050904_MSG0005
rows.name:
Are you ready...?
Here... I come![ST:wait ]
